name: My content partially at fault? Perplexity linked back - still sueable?
description: Yes, links don't excuse substitution copying.[1]

mainEntity.name: My content partially at fault? Perplexity linked back - still sueable?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, links don't excuse substitution copying.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Links don't immunize; NYT notes users skip sources due to full reproductions.[1] Partial attribution irrelevant if substantial copying substitutes.[1] Key factors: output completeness, user behavior surveys for market harm.[1] Test if links deter visits; claim dilution persists. Links weaken but don't defeat claims.
